overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit city. The character traverses a bustling urban street with towering holographic advertisements, crosses a wide intersection with yellow grid markings, and continues along a sidewalk lined with glowing storefronts and vending machines.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated city sidewalk with safety railings overlooking multi-lane road

events.description: character transitions from walking to running briefly while approaching the intersection

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the sidewalk next to orange safety railings, observing passing traffic and neon billboards

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving along the wet road surface

entered.detail: metal barrier separating sidewalk from street drop
tall pole with bright overhead light illuminating the wet pavement
tall building-mounted advertisement with glowing red and blue graphics
high-rise building with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a wet concrete sidewalk bordered by orange safety railings. The character walks past street lamps and observes the multi-lane road with sparse traffic. Neon billboards illuminate the night on distant buildings, reflecting off the rain-slicked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban intersection with yellow grid no-parking markings

events.description: stepping off the sidewalk onto the yellow-grid marked crosswalk
pausing briefly to allow a vehicle to pass before continuing across

agents.ego_description: navigating across the wide intersection, moving between lanes of traffic on the yellow-grid crosswalk

notable_agents.action: silver coupe driving through the intersection
white sedan approaching the crosswalk area

entered.detail: painted yellow crisscross lines marking the pedestrian crossing area
tall pole with traffic signals and attached signage

segments.scene_description: The character enters the wide intersection, walking across the distinctive yellow grid crosswalk markings. Vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt as the character moves from one side of the multi-lane road to the other. The orange safety railings of the previous sidewalk recede behind as the traffic light pole becomes prominent on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts and arcade entrances

events.description: stepping onto the opposite sidewalk, leaving the crosswalk
passing a prominent pink neon sign reading WET DREAM on a building facade

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past various storefronts, vending machines, and neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white cap and red pants walking toward the camera
figure standing near a storefront entrance

entered.detail: building entrance with glowing interior and neon trim
large bright pink neon sign with stylized text on building facade
row of illuminated vending machines along the building wall
massive structural column supporting the overpass above

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along a sidewalk lined with commercial establishments. Bright neon signs including a prominent pink 'WET DREAM' sign illuminate the storefronts. The character passes vending machines and arcade entrances while encountering occasional pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The atmosphere remains consistently rainy and neon-lit throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, rain-slicked sidewalk across a wide urban intersection and into a densely lit commercial district. It begins on a wet concrete walkway bordered by orange safety railings, moving past street lamps while neon billboards reflect off the damp pavement. As the character leaves the railings behind, the scene opens into a broad intersection where the camera tracks across distinctive yellow grid crosswalk markings amidst passing traffic. The perspective then shifts toward the opposite sidewalk, moving past a traffic light pole and into a corridor of glowing storefronts. Finally, the environment becomes more crowded with pedestrians and vending machines, illuminated by vibrant neon signage including a prominent pink Wet Dream sign.
